description: The 'Ndrina Bruni is a 'ndrina (clan) of the 'Ndrangheta, a Calabrian mafia organization, based in Cosenza, Italy. It is involved in drug trafficking, extortion, and infiltration of businesses. Key members include Michele Bruni, arrested in 2009, and Luca Bruni, who disappeared in 2012. The clan has been targeted in major police operations, including a 2010 arrest of 49 people.
